Tracing of Firearms in Connection With Criminal InvestigationsMemorandum of President of the United States, , 78 F.R. 4301, which requires Federal law enforcement agencies to ensure that all firearms recovered after , in the course of criminal investigations and taken into Federal custody are traced through the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives at the earliest time practicable, was editorially reclassified and is set out as a note under , Crime Control and Law Enforcement.Jan. 16, 2013Jan. 16, 2013section 40901 of Title 34

Promoting Smart Gun TechnologyMemorandum of President of the United States, , 81 F.R. 719, which requires the Department of Defense, the Department of Justice, and the Department of Homeland Security to conduct or sponsor research into gun safety technology, review such research, and explore potential ways to further its use and development to more broadly improve gun safety, was editorially reclassified and is set out as a note under , Crime Control and Law Enforcement.Jan. 4, 2016section 40901 of Title 34
